zh.lifeSummary: 當Wilhelm von Jülich於1299年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫乃德根時，他的母親NN Van Kessel45歲，父親Gerhard V. von Jülich48歲。他於1324年2月26日與Jeanne de Hainaut在爾利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年2月26日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫爾利享年62歲，埋葬在爾利乃德根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wilhelm von Jülich于1299年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫乃德根时，他的母亲NN Van Kessel45岁，父亲Gerhard V. von Jülich48岁。他于1324年2月26日与Jeanne de Hainaut在爾利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年2月26日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫爾利享年62岁，埋葬在爾利乃德根。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Wilhelm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from wil ‘will’ + helm ‘helmet’; an ancient royal name. See also William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Wilhelm von Jülich was born in 1299, in Nideggen, Düren, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his mother, NN Van Kessel, was 45 and his father, Gerhard V. von Jülich, was 48. He married Jeanne de Hainaut on 26 February 1324, in Jülich. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 26 February 1361, in Jülich, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 62, and was buried in Nideggen, Jülich.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wilhelm von Jülich est né en 1299, à Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, sa mère, NN Van Kessel, avait 45 ans et son père, Gerhard V. von Jülich, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Hainaut le 26 février 1324, à Jülich. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 26 février 1361, à Jülich, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Nideggen, Jülich.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wilhelm von Jülich 1299 in Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war seine Mutter NN Van Kessel 45 und sein Vater Gerhard V. von Jülich 48. Er hat am 26. Februar 1324 in Jülich Jeanne de Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Februar 1361 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Jülich, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland und wurde in Nideggen, Jülich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm von Jülich è nato il nel 1299 nel Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo madre, NN Van Kessel, aveva 45 anni e il suo padre, Gerhard V. von Jülich, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Hainaut il 26 febbraio 1324, nel Jülich. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 febbraio 1361, nel Jülich, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Nideggen, Jülich.

ja.lifeSummary: Wilhelm von Jülichが1299年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンドuレンニデグジェンで生まれた時，母NN Van Kesselは45歳，父Gerhard V. von Jülichは48歳であった。1324年2月26日にジuリチでJeanne de Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年2月26日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンジuリチで62歳で死去し，ジuリチニデグジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Wilhelm von Jülich(이)가 1299년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 드u런 나이데겐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 NN Van Kessel(은)는 45세였고, 그의 아버지 Gerhard V. von Jülich(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1324년 2월 26일 제이u리치에서 Jeanne de Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 2월 26일 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 제이u리치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 제이u리치 나이데겐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm von Jülich nasceu em 1299, em Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, sua mãe, NN Van Kessel, tinha 45 anos e seu pai, Gerhard V. von Jülich, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Hainaut em 26 de fevereiro de 1324, em Jülich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1361, em Jülich, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Nideggen, Jülich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wilhelm von Jülich родился в 1299 г. в местности нидеген, дuрен, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его матери по имени NN Van Kessel было 45 лет, а отцу, которого звали Gerhard V. von Jülich, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Hainaut 26 февраля 1324 г. в местности джuлич. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 26 февраля 1361 г. в местности джuлич, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности нидеген, джuлич.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wilhelm von Jülich nació en 1299, en Nideggen, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su mamá, NN Van Kessel, tenía 45 años y su papá, Gerhard V. von Jülich, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Hainaut el 26 de febrero de 1324, en Jülich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1361, en Jülich, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Nideggen, Jülich.
